mapper.select: select * from sas where user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
select * from sas where user_id=#{userId} and yearweek(log_date,1) between yearweek(now(),1) - 1 and yearweek(now(),1) order by log_date desc limit 1
select * from sas where yearweek(log_date,1) between yearweek(now(),1) - 1 and yearweek(now(),1)
select *,user_info.user_name as username from sas left join user_info on sas.user_id = user_info.user_id
